sections.category: LLM Workflow > Corpus2Skill / "Skills bilang navigable artifact"

bullets.body: **Corpus2Skill (arxiv 2604.14572, Apr 27) — distill-corpus-into-skill-tree RAG na tinatalo ang dense retrieval / RAPTOR / agentic RAG sa WixQA, walang vector DB sa serve time** — Ko-compile ang document corpus offline sa hierarchical skill directory: iterative document clustering + LLM-written summaries sa bawat antas + tree ng navigable skill files. Sa serve time, tatanggap ang agent ng bird's-eye view, mag-drill down sa topic branches via lalong pinipinong summaries, at kunin ang full documents by ID. **Pinakamataas na quality sa lahat ng metric ng WixQA** vs flat retrieval / RAPTOR / multi-turn agentic RAG. Pwedeng inspeksyunin ng tao ang skill directory kaya kayang mag-isip ang agent kung saan mag-tingin, mag-backtrack, at pag-isahin ang ebidensya sa bawat branch.

citations.label: arXiv - Don't Retrieve, Navigate: Distilling Enterprise Knowledge into Navigable Agent Skills for QA and RAG (Corpus2Skill)

bullets.body: **Externalization in LLM Agents (arxiv 2604.08224, Apr 24) — survey na nag-frame sa weights → prompts → skills/harness/protocol bilang 2026 design pattern** — Naiintindihan ang recent history ng LLM agents bilang progressive movement palabas mula sa model: ang capability ay unang itinuring na property ng weights, tapos ng prompts/context, at ngayon ng infrastructure. Ang canonical 2026 framing para sa 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, AgentCore Managed Harness, Hermes Agent.

citations.label: arXiv - Externalization in LLM Agents (2604.08224)

sections.category: LLM Workflow > OpenClaw / NemoClaw / Hermes Agents

bullets.body: **Hermes Agent v0.11.0 "Interface" — adoption Apr 27–29; Ink-based React TUI, native AWS Bedrock, GPT-5.5 via Codex OAuth, 5 new inference paths, ika-17 messaging platform (QQBot)** — Carry-forward; pluggable transport architecture sa ilalim ng bawat provider. Nagbibigay ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ng first-class Hermes-compatible runtimes.

citations.label: GitHub - NousResearch/hermes-agent

bullets.body: **OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train, patuloy Apr 27–29** — Voice-stack hardening, browser-automation safe-tab URLs, CDP-native role-snapshot fallback. Nag-ship ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ng Sandbox Skills para sa OpenClaw bilang first-class deployment target.

citations.label: OpenClaw Releases

bullets.body: **Multica v0.2.18 (Apr 27) — pumalit sa v0.2.16 (Apr 24); pinalalalim ang orchestrator-skills surface** — v0.2.16 baseline: dedicated sidebar ang Chat V2, right-click context menus sa issues, in-app feedback flow, redesigned Autopilot modal. Naglu-launch ang v0.2.18 sa parehong window ng Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind at Apr 28 Novita Sandbox launch. Open-source, vendor-neutral, self-hosted; nakatabi sa AgentCore Managed Harness + Claude Managed Agents sa orchestration layer.

citations.label: GitHub - multica-ai/multica releases

bullets.body: **Naglu-launch ang Novita Sandbox noong Apr 28 — managed NovitaClaw deployments + Sandbox Skills para sa OpenClaw + Hermes-compatible runtimes + persistent-node configs** — Unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent threat surface. Counterpart sa AgentCore microVM isolation pero may kamalayan sa skill-marketplace; nakaposisyon laban sa ClawHavoc + 36% prompt-injection finding ng Cisco.

citations.label: PR Newswire - Novita AI Launches Sandbox

bullets.body: **Google TurboQuant (ICLR 2026, Apr 23–25 Rio; Research blog Apr 24–29 traction) — 3.5-bit-per-value KV-cache compression na katas ng FP16 sa LongBench / Needle-in-a-Haystack nang walang retraining; 6x compression, 8x faster attention** — Algorithm: MSE-driven Fast Walsh-Hadamard rotation + 3-bit Lloyd-Max quantization ng rotated cache. Targeted ang official Python implementation ng Google sa Q2 2026; community impls sa MLX + Triton + vLLM + SGLang ay umiikot na.

citations.label: Google Research - TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression

bullets.body: **SGLang TurboQuant integration — PR #21419 in-tree (`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`); follow-up #23134 fused-Triton-decode/extend kernel rewrite umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput vs ~1% sa original implementation** — First-class deployment knob para sa compressed-cache inference; may hot-path full-pool dequant bug ang original PR na nagpababa ng throughput, ang fix issue #23134 ay direktang nagba-basa ng packed 4-bit KV sa attention.

citations.label: GitHub Issue - SGLang #23134 TurboQuant fused Triton kernels

bullets.body: **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) — shared asymmetrically-compressed KV-pool para sa multi-agent LLM inference; int8 keys + TurboQuant-MSE 3-bit values via HF DynamicCache injection** — Sumusulat nang isang beses ng compressed cache at ini-inject sa N independent agent contexts. Pinapanatili ng asymmetric compression ang softmax stability (keys sa int8) habang mas pinipiga ang values (3-bit FWHT-rotated Lloyd-Max). Ang unang published na multi-agent KV-cache architecture na nakabatay sa TurboQuant.

citations.label: arXiv - PolyKV: A Shared Asymmetrically-Compressed KV Cache Pool for Multi-Agent LLM Inference

bullets.body: **NVIDIA kvpress — Decoding-Press maturity; ExpectedAttentionPress na may configurable compression ratios (0.7 / 0.5); AIME25 + Math500 + LongBench benchmarks; post_init_from_model hook** — Open-source LLM-KV-cache-compression-made-easy framework. Maraming compression methods + benchmarks na nakasandig sa Hugging Face transformers; nagdadagdag ang recent releases ng decoding-phase compression.

citations.label: GitHub - NVIDIA/kvpress

bullets.body: **TriAttention (MIT + NVIDIA + Zhejiang U, Apr 11) — 10.7x na KV-cache compression na katas ng full attention sa 25% mas mataas na throughput** — Carry-forward sa Apr 27–29 utility-wave window.

citations.label: Dev Journal - TriAttention: MIT and NVIDIA's 10.7x KV Cache Compression

bullets.body: **vLLM v0.20.0 path: CUDA 13.0 default + PyTorch 2.11 + Python 3.14 support; transformers v5 compatibility wave (PR #30566)** — Carry-forward; nagshi-ship sa torch 2.11 para sa CUDA. Lumipat ang default image (`vllm/vllm-openai:v0.20.0`) at PyPI wheel sa CUDA 13.0.

Patuloy na umiikot ang PoC `github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE`; aktibo ang CERT/CC VU#915947.
